name: phd2
description: Install PHD2 (PHD Guiding) for telescope autoguiding support.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$phd2Path='C:\Program Files\PHD2\phd2.exe'; $log=Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\phd2-verify.log'; if (Test-Path $phd2Path) { Set-Content -Path $log -Value 'PHD2 installed successfully'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\phd2-smoke.txt') -Value 'phd2_ok' } else { 'PHD2 executable not found at ' + $phd2Path | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8 }"
